Detailed Description

TuningParameter Storage.

  • Storage structure for any LLD tuning parms which are dynamically altered by low level functions mostly when programming directly to the device

Added as part of Patch_AddingTuningParmStorage_11821

Definition at line 254 of file vl53l1_ll_def.h.
